headline: Albemarle Had Its Best Day Since 2023. The Lithium Stock Gets Downgraded Anyway.
summary: Albemarle  stock received a downgrade Friday, one day after shares of the lithium miner jumped 16% to notch their highest close in well more than two years.  Baird analysts cut their rating on  Albemarle  to Neutral from Outperform while keeping their price target unchanged at $120.  Albemarle stock fell 8.3% to $197.74 on Friday.

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher As Inflation Jitters Linger
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Apr, 17 2026 US stock futures are pointing slightly higher this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.2%, as investors weigh firm bond yields against mixed economic signals. The 10 year US Treasury yield is holding above 4.3% while oil prices stay elevated, which together keep borrowing costs and inflation worries in focus for households and rate sensitive sectors such as real estate and utilities.
